title: Temporary fix for test suite
body: We leak open files when creating new c/storage stores (locks do not close themselves, so the open FDs in the test suite increase every time we use c/storage to load cached images for the tests). Fix this temporarily by increasing rlimits on open files until we can create a permanent fix next release.

comments.body: @rhatdan @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL. Let's get this merged to unblock other PRs and cut a release.
LGTM (Really looks bad to me, but I would rather get the feature in)>
